extraction.one_line_summary: SAGAN Peter won from a break after 15-month drought, repeatedly following attacks on final climb before solo descent to victory
tactical_patterns: UAE Emirates delayed breakaway control until final climbs, allowing 13-second gap over crest to survive descent.
Ineos sacrificed Vandewalle's breakaway position to pace peloton for sprint points jersey defense against Sagan.
Sagan's strategy: never initiate on final climb, only follow attacks then solo over top for descent.

rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: ended 15-month drought by tactically following every attack without leading, suggests renewed climbing ability
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: gained 4-second time bonus finishing with sprint despite being GC leader, opportunistic
rider_signals.FULGSANG Jakob: negative: lost over one minute on lumpy stage due to late mechanical, GC ambitions compromised
rider_signals.BILBAO Pello: neutral: bridged from peloton to catch breakaway remnants but caught before finish with 5km remaining
rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: positive: second place moved him to same time as GC leader, UAE showing dual-threat capability
